Providing quality housing solutions for Jamaican nationals across all income brackets.

About HCC

The Housing Construction Corporation (HCC) is a government-mandated agency established to address the housing needs of Jamaican nationals. Our mandate is rooted in the belief that every Jamaican deserves access to safe, decent, and affordable housing.

We plan, develop, and manage residential communities across Jamaica, ensuring that housing is accessible to individuals and families at varying income levels — from entry-level earners to upper-middle income households.

HCC developments feature quality housing units, essential amenities, security infrastructure, and accessible locations, making each community a place where residents can truly thrive.

Our Mission & Values

🏠 Affordable Housing

Making quality housing accessible to Jamaicans of all economic backgrounds with developments at multiple income tiers.

👪 Community Development

Fostering vibrant communities with shared amenities, green spaces, and security features that promote a high quality of life.

🔒 Safe Living

All HCC developments include gated entries, CCTV systems, and 24-hour security so residents always feel safe at home.

🌎 Island-Wide Reach

Serving parishes across Jamaica including Kingston, St. Andrew, and St. Catherine to ensure nationwide access to housing.

Our Housing Communities

HCC currently manages three residential developments across Jamaica, each tailored to meet the needs of specific income groups.

Community Location Min. Income
Birkshire Gardens St. Andrew $75,000 / month
Bampton Villas St. Catherine $95,000 / month
Helmsley Court Kingston $125,000 / month
View All Communities →

Who Can Apply?

HCC housing is open to Jamaican nationals who meet the following general criteria:

  • Age: 20–45 years at time of application
  • Must not currently own property
  • Meet the minimum net monthly income for the selected community
  • Total expenses and loan repayments must not exceed 50% of net income
  • Valid government-issued ID required

To learn more or begin your application, please contact us by email or visit our office at 123 Skyline Drive, Kingston.


Upcoming Events

The formal opening ceremony for the housing communities is proposed to take place between May 15th and May 20th, 2026. Approved applicants will receive a formal invitation with specific times and plot numbers closer to the date.
